details.message: Customer has requested a site visit for next week. Please confirm availability.

details.notes: Site visit completed successfully on Nov 15th. Customer was impressed with the facility's high ceilings.

details.feedbackText: The customer requires clarification on the load-bearing capacity of the floor to support heavy machinery.

details.message: Please arrange a site visit for the Heavy-Lift Manufacturing team. They are keen to see the crane support structure.

details.improvementsText: Customer has indicated they will require an additional 10-ton EOT crane to be installed. They may also need a small office extension.
